§6Desh§f

§aA nearly indestructible superalloy of nine rare earth metals — used in advanced machines, tools, and armor!§f

Desh is a fictional superalloy made of nine rare earth metals refined with mercury and light oil. It has extremely high blast-resistance, heat-resistance, corrosion-resistance, and durability — an excellent material for advanced machinery. Desh emits no radiation and actively shields against it.

§6Production§f:
§b• Desh Blend§f: Obtained from asteroid mining ships, or crafted from 9 rare earth metal powders (Boron, Lanthanum, Lithium, Cobalt, Neodymium, Cerium, Niobium — shapeless recipe).
§b• Chemical Plant§f: §e1×§f Desh Blend + §e200mB§f Mercury + §e200mB§f Light Oil → §e1×§f Desh Ingot.
§b• Ore Acidizer§f: DeshReady™ Blend + §e500mB§f Hydrogen Peroxide → §e1×§f Desh Ingot.

§6Uses§f:
§b• Advanced Radiation Absorber§f: Desh Blend + Bakelite.
§b• Desh Shredder Blades§f: Better shredding for ore processing.
§b• Desh Compound Plate§f: Forged in a Tier 3 Anvil (4 Desh Ingots + 2 Polymer Powder + 1 High-Speed Steel Ingot).
§b• Tools§f: Desh tools have iron-level harvest level but are unbreakable.
§b• Armor§f: Can be upgraded to Schrabidium tools.
§b• Fracking Tower§f: Uses large amounts of desh components.
§b• Missiles§f: Size 15 Solid Fuel Missile Fuselage can be plated in desh for increased HP.

§eTip§f: Desh is gated behind §bLight Oil§f and §bMercury§f production. The Centrifuge provides renewable mercury from redstone. The §e9-component blend§f is the most reliable production method once you have access to rare earth metals!
